name: modern
label: Modern / urban
description: Contemporary everyday scenes — commute, café, gym, classroom, supermarket. For LoRAs intended to generalise across modern photographic settings.

scenes.label: Subway platform
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character on a busy underground subway platform and change the pose. Cool fluorescent overhead light, tiled walls, distant train motion blur, the character is checking a phone, weight on one hip.

scenes.label: Coffee shop window
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character at a window seat in a small coffee shop and change the pose. Soft afternoon backlight from the window, warm interior fill, the character is mid-conversation with hands gesturing, a mug on the table.

scenes.label: Supermarket aisle
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character standing in a supermarket aisle and change the pose. Even fluorescent overhead light, colorful packaging on the shelves, the character is reaching for an item with mild concentration.

scenes.label: Gym floor
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character on a commercial gym floor and change the pose. Cool overhead light with warm accent strips, racks of weights in the background, the character is mid-stretch, focused, slight perspiration.

scenes.label: Classroom (chalkboard)
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character at the front of a classroom by a chalkboard and change the pose. Soft window light from the side, rows of empty desks behind, the character is gesturing with chalk in hand, mid-explanation.

scenes.label: Open-plan office
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character in an open-plan office between desks and change the pose. Soft mixed light from monitors and overhead fluorescents, the character is leaning lightly on a desk, listening with arms folded.

scenes.label: Rooftop bar (dusk)
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character at a city rooftop bar at dusk and change the pose. String lights overhead, distant skyline glow, the character is leaning on a railing with a glass in hand, relaxed, looking out.

scenes.label: Hospital corridor
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character in a quiet hospital corridor and change the pose. Cool clinical fluorescent light, polished linoleum reflecting the ceiling, the character is walking purposefully with hands at sides, mild concern.

scenes.label: Underground car park
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character in an underground car park at night and change the pose. Sodium-lit pillars, shadows pooling between cars, the character is walking briskly, glancing back over one shoulder, alert.

scenes.label: Laundromat
scenes.default_prompt: Put this exact character in a small laundromat at night and change the pose. Warm yellow overhead lights, washing-machine porthole glow, the character is sitting on a folding table, reading something on a phone, hunched and absorbed.
